name: Glute Hypertrophy
description: Jeff Nippard's Glute Hypertrophy Program - 8 weeks, 2 blocks (Accumulation + Metabolic Focus), 5 days per week

phases.name: Block 1: Accumulation
phases.description: Weeks 1-6, progressive overload with 5 training days per week focusing on glute development

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Drive through heels, keep knees out in direction of toes, wider stance, 15 degree foot flare. RPE 8

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Set hips back until stretch is felt in hamstrings, thrust hips forward and squeeze glutes hard at the top

exercises.name: A1. Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Full ROM, should feel stretch in hamstrings on eccentric. Superset with Swiss Ball Leg Curl

exercises.name: A2. Swiss Ball Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Keep glutes elevated, thighs in a straight line with upper body, curl ball in toward your glutes

exercises.name: Machine Hip Abduction (Glutes Elevated)
exercises.notes: Keep glutes 2-6 inches elevated off the seat, use a fast tempo and keep constant tension - no rest between reps!

exercises.name: Leg Raise Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform hanging, using roman chair or lying - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Crunch Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform using a cable, weighted or machine - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Keep shoulder blades retracted, stop range of motion once elbows reach 90 degrees

exercises.name: Close Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Pull through elbows, think of arms as connectors, touch bar to chest

exercises.name: Close Grip Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Drive elbows down for lat focus over trap focus, pull to stomach

exercises.name: Lean Away Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Put cable between legs and lean away, drive out with the back of your hand, not up with your traps

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Experiment with grip and see how you feel rear delts engage the most, push handles out, don't pull back

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Use a wider stance, 15 degree foot flare, squeeze glutes at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust (Dropset)
exercises.notes: Reduce load by ~40-50%, perform another 15-20 reps with consistent form

exercises.name: A1. Cable Pullthrough
exercises.notes: Use rope attachment, slight bend in knees, set hips back to feel big stretch in glutes, explosively thrust hips forward. Superset with Single Leg Hip Thrust

exercises.name: A2. Single Leg Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Use preloaded barbell or hold a plate in lap, constant tension on glutes

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kick Back
exercises.notes: Slight lean forward, push back then up in a slight arc, hold onto upright for support

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Feet pointed straight ahead, 1 second pause at the bottom of each rep

exercises.name: Leg Raise Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform hanging, roman chair or lying - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Lean back 30 degrees, use slight momentum, last set to failure

exercises.name: 1-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Pull dumbbell to back pocket, stretch on lats at the bottom

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Chest Press
exercises.notes: 45 degree incline, mind muscle connection with upper pecs

exercises.name: Dumbbell Raise Complex
exercises.notes: 15 side raises, 15 front raises, 15 rear delt flyes, no rest = 1 set

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Stand in the middle of a band and perform lateral raises, faster tempo, constant tension on delts

exercises.name: Banded Squat Bouncer
exercises.notes: 2/3 bottom range of motion, band around knees, constant tension on glutes

exercises.name: Banded Abduction (Seated)
exercises.notes: Band around knees, focus on driving knees out, feel glute medius to ensure activation

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.notes: 20 total strides, use dumbbells or a barbell (less trap involvement with barbell)

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kick Back
exercises.notes: Slight lean forward, push back then up in a slight arc, hold onto upright for support

exercises.name: Lower Back Extension
exercises.notes: Slightly round lower back, 15 degree foot flare, squeeze glutes at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Banded Side Walk
exercises.notes: 20 reps each direction, miniband around feet or full band around knees, slight bend at hips, short ~6 inch steps

exercises.name: Frog Pump
exercises.notes: Hard glute squeeze at the top of each rep, faster tempo, challenge yourself for more reps each week!

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Drive through heels, keep knees out in direction of toes, wider stance, 15 degree foot flare. RPE 8

exercises.notes: Can perform hanging, using roman chair or lying - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Crunch Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform using a cable, weighted or machine - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Keep shoulder blades retracted, stop range of motion once elbows reach 90 degrees

exercises.name: Close Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Pull through elbows, think of arms as connectors, touch bar to chest

exercises.name: Close Grip Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Drive elbows down for lat focus over trap focus, pull to stomach

exercises.name: Lean Away Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Drive out with the back of your hand, not up with your traps

exercises.name: Reverse Cable Flye
exercises.notes: Set up between two cables overhead and flye back using rear delts

exercises.notes: Heavier weight this week with no dropset

phases.name: Block 2: Metabolic Focus
phases.description: Weeks 7-8, deload-style metabolic focus with different exercise selection emphasizing glute activation and metabolic stress

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Light weight, practice good form and control. RPE 6

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Consistent speed and range of motion across all reps - control!

exercises.name: Swiss Ball Triple Threat
exercises.notes: Full ROM, should feel stretch in hamstrings on eccentric

exercises.name: Elevated Glute Bridge
exercises.notes: Perform bodyweight, feet up on bench. Squeeze glutes hard at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Leg Raise Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform hanging, using roman chair or lying - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Crunch Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform using a cable, weighted or machine - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Banded Sumo Walk
exercises.notes: Bend at hips, wide stance, short steps moving forward, 1 step = 1 rep

exercises.name: Banded Side Walk
exercises.notes: 15 reps each direction, miniband around feet or full band around knees, slight bend at hips, short ~6 inch steps

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kickback
exercises.notes: Slight lean forward, push back then up in a slight arc, hold onto upright for support

exercises.name: Machine Hip Abduction (Glutes Elevated)
exercises.notes: Keep glutes 2-6 inches elevated off the seat, use a fast tempo and keep constant tension - no rest between reps!

exercises.name: Dumbbell Raise Complex
exercises.notes: 15 side raises, 15 front raises, 15 rear delt flyes, no rest = 1 set

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Experiment with grip and see how you feel rear delts engage the most, push handles out, don't pull back

exercises.name: Banded Side Lying Clams
exercises.notes: Band around knees, feet together, focus on activating glute medius

exercises.name: Single Leg Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Use preloaded barbell or hold a plate in lap, constant tension on glutes

exercises.name: A1. Banded Side Walk
exercises.notes: 15 reps each direction, miniband around feet or full band around knees, slight bend at hips, short ~6 inch steps

exercises.name: A2. Frog Pumps
exercises.notes: Hard glute squeeze at the top of each rep, faster tempo, challenge yourself for more reps each week!

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Feet pointed straight ahead, 1 second pause at the bottom of each rep

exercises.name: Leg Raise Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform hanging, roman chair or lying - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Lower Back Extension (Pumper)
exercises.notes: Use only the middle 1/2 of the range of motion and keep constant tension on glutes

exercises.name: Banded Squat Bouncer
exercises.notes: 2/3 bottom range of motion, band around knees, constant tension on glutes

exercises.name: Banded Abduction (Seated)
exercises.notes: Band around knees, focus on driving knees out, feel glute medius to ensure activation

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kickback
exercises.notes: Slight lean forward, push back then up in a slight arc, hold onto upright for support

exercises.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Lean back 30 degrees, use slight momentum, lighter weight

exercises.name: 1-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.notes: Pull dumbbell to back pocket, stretch on lats at the bottom

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Use lighter weight, mind muscle connection with hamstrings

exercises.name: Cable Pullthrough
exercises.notes: Use rope attachment, slight bend in knees, set hips back to feel big stretch in glutes, explosively thrust hips forward

exercises.name: Standing Cable Hip Abduction
exercises.notes: Hold onto upright for support, palpate glute medius to ensure activation

exercises.name: Banded Side Lying Clams
exercises.notes: Band around knees, feet together, focus on activating glute medius

exercises.name: Lean Away Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Put cable between legs and lean away, drive out with the back of your hand, not up with your traps

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Light weight, practice good form and control. RPE 6

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Consistent speed and range of motion across all reps - control!

exercises.name: Swiss Ball Triple Threat
exercises.notes: Full ROM, should feel stretch in hamstrings on eccentric

exercises.name: Elevated Glute Bridge
exercises.notes: Perform bodyweight, feet up on bench. Squeeze glutes hard at the top of each rep

exercises.name: Leg Raise Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform hanging, using roman chair or lying - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Crunch Variation (Abs)
exercises.notes: Can perform using a cable, weighted or machine - challenge yourself!

exercises.name: Banded Sumo Walk
exercises.notes: Bend at hips, wide stance, short steps moving forward, 1 step = 1 rep

exercises.name: Banded Side Walk
exercises.notes: 15 reps each direction, miniband around feet or full band around knees, slight bend at hips, short ~6 inch steps

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kickback
exercises.notes: Slight lean forward, push back then up in a slight arc, hold onto upright for support

exercises.name: Machine Hip Abduction (Glutes Elevated)
exercises.notes: Keep glutes 2-6 inches elevated off the seat, use a fast tempo and keep constant tension - no rest between reps!

exercises.name: Dumbbell Raise Complex
exercises.notes: 15 side raises, 15 front raises, 15 rear delt flyes, no rest = 1 set

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.notes: Experiment with grip and see how you feel rear delts engage the most, push handles out, don't pull back

exercises.name: Banded Side Lying Clams
exercises.notes: Band around knees, feet together, focus on activating glute medius

exercises.name: Single Leg Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Use preloaded barbell or hold a plate in lap, constant tension on glutes

exercises.name: A1. Banded Side Walk
exercises.notes: 15 reps each direction, miniband around feet or full band around knees, slight bend at hips, short ~6 inch steps

exercises.name: A2. Frog Pumps
exercises.notes: Hard glute squeeze at the top of each rep, faster tempo, challenge yourself for more reps each week!

exercises.notes: Feet pointed straight ahead, 1 second pause at the bottom of each rep
